name: Overnight Deep Optimization: The Accuracy & Speed Marathon

userStories.title: Regex Expansion: The 'Missing 50' Harvest
userStories.description: The benchmark currently misses 53 picks. Analyze the 'CRITICAL: Sample MISSED PICKS' section in `benchmark/reports/final_platform_grade.json`. Update `src/rule_based_extractor.py` with specific regex patterns for: 1) Team names followed by line/odds on the next line. 2) ML picks with 'MI' or 'Moneyline' variations. 3) Player props (Goal/Point scorers) that are currently being ignored.
acceptanceCriteria: Recall increases to > 85% WITHOUT using AI refinement.
Zero regressions in existing rule-based picks.

userStories.title: Extreme Throughput: Batch & Provider Balancing
userStories.description: Optimize `src/parallel_batch_processor.py` for maximum throughput. 1) Implement 'Provider Striping' to use Groq, Cerebras, and Mistral simultaneously for different batches. 2) Increase global concurrency to 32. 3) Optimize the Refinement prompt to be < 500 tokens to stay under TPM limits. Goal is to sustain > 5.0 msg/sec.
acceptanceCriteria: Successful handling of 429 errors via immediate provider rotation.

userStories.title: False Positive Cleanup & Noise Filtering
userStories.description: We currently have 70-160 False Positives. Many are 'noise' (chat, headers). Update `src/pick_normalizer.py` or `src/semantic_validator.py` to filter out: 1) Picks with impossible odds (e.g. > +5000 or < -5000). 2) Picks where team names aren't in our league database. 3) Duplicate picks from the same author in the same message.

userStories.title: The 500-Message Gauntlet (Full Benchmark)
userStories.description: The ultimate test. Set `FULL_BENCHMARK=1` and run the entire 500-message goldenset. The agent must iteratively fix every crash, timeout, or logic error that appears on the larger dataset. This task requires high endurance and stable error handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Full benchmark (500 items) completes in < 5 minutes.
Final Metrics: F1 > 90%, Throughput > 5.0 msg/sec, Tokens/Pick < 500.
Code passed ruff check and ruff format.
